filters.q: ={{ (() => { const intent = $json.actionIntent || $json.body?.profile?.actionIntent || $json.profile?.actionIntent || {}; const op = $json.integrationOperation || intent.operation || 'summarize_inbox'; const q = (intent.query || $json.integrationQuery || '').trim(); const from = (intent.from || '').trim(); const subject = (intent.subject || '').trim(); const after = (intent.after || '').trim(); const before = (intent.before || '').trim(); const newer = intent.newer || (op === 'career_emails' ? '30d' : '7d'); const parts = ['in:inbox']; if (q) parts.push(q); if (from) parts.push('from:' + from); if (subject) parts.push('subject:' + subject); if (after) parts.push('after:' + after); if (before) parts.push('before:' + before); if (!after && !before && newer) parts.push('newer_than:' + newer); if (!q && op === 'important_emails') parts.push('(is:important OR is:starred OR newer_than:2d)'); if (!q && op === 'career_emails') parts.push('(vaga OR estagio OR curriculo OR entrevista OR recrutador OR candidatura)'); return parts.join(' '); })() }}

parameters.jsCode:
const prepared = $('Preparar Envio WhatsApp').first().json;
return [{ json: { reply: 'Mensagem enviada pelo WhatsApp, Chefe. Destinatario: +' + prepared.to + '.', service: 'whatsapp', operation: 'send_whatsapp_confirmed', sent: true } }];
return [{ json: { ...$json, reply: $json.reply || 'Chefe, bloqueei o envio do WhatsApp porque faltou confirmacao explicita.', blocked: true } }];

return [{ json: { reply: 'Chefe, nesta etapa o WhatsApp esta preparado apenas para envio confirmado. A leitura de conversas exige webhook publico e sera configurada separadamente.', service: 'whatsapp', blocked: true } }];
